desc: Debug command: Re-import MEP tags from JSON file.
summary: Debug command: Re-import MEP tags from JSON file. Recreates tags at the exact same positions exported by ExportMEPTagsToJsonCommand. MATCHING STRATEGY: 1. ElementId match - fastest, works if same model 2. UniqueId match - works across models if element preserved 3. Category + Location match - works if element moved but type same
usecase: User wants to restore tags after model changes. User needs to transfer tags between views. User wants to apply saved tag positions to updated model.
notfor: Not for autonomous AI execution. This command requires interactive Revit UI input (dialogs, picks, or manual confirmation).
precondition: Active view must be a plan, section, or 3D view. JSON file from ExportMEPTagsToJsonCommand must exist. Elements referenced in JSON should exist in current model.
postcondition: Tags are created at the exact positions specified in the JSON. Elements are tagged using the matching strategy.

outputs.name: TagsSkipped
outputs.description: Number of tags skipped (element not found)

preprompts: Restoring tag positions from saved file...
successprompts: Done! Restored tags from JSON file.
